Title: List of All Bosses and Monsters | Resident Evil Requiem (RE9)

URL Source: http://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/582585

Published Time: 2026-02-26 07:47:02 -0500

Markdown Content:
![Image 1: Resident Evil Requiem List of All Bosses](https://img.game8.co/4425847/925135fe455492335754147b892998f5.png/show)

This is a list of all bosses in Resident Evil Requiem (RE9). Read on for a list of all bosses, monsters, and enemies for Grace and Leon.

| # | Boss | Playable Character | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | [![Image 2: Shadow Ghost](https://img.game8.co/4425966/da035641bcf079f25b9521da5823c53b.png/show)Shadow Ghost (The Girl)](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583273) | ![Image 3: Grace Ashcroft](https://img.game8.co/4413485/42c5ed79a3fe2159ad165f9c2ad67002.png/show) Grace | This is the first boss you encounter while playing as Grace. It's a fairly large monster with long white hair. It is attracted to sound and **it is hurt by light**. |
| 2 | [![Image 4: Chunk](https://img.game8.co/4427118/0ceb29b4527068bf7937e1371a3e5329.png/show)Chunk](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583580) | ![Image 5: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Leon encounters Chunk, a fat, big-headed monster that is eating a human. He picks up the [MSBG 500](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583700), a pump-action shotgun, to deal higher damage to the monster. |
| 3 | [![Image 6: Blister Borne](https://img.game8.co/4427506/f815f095a213338450d52ce0d357a655.png/show)Blister Borne](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583623) | ![Image 7: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Leon fights the Blister Borne after meeting Grace and Emily at the church The **orange cysts on its body are its weak points**. |
| 4 | [![Image 8: Shadow Ghost Final Encounter](https://img.game8.co/4427681/b27271449e75274b6ff67663a2e4204b.png/show)Shadow Ghost](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583273#hm_3)**(Final Encounter)** | ![Image 9: Grace Ashcroft](https://img.game8.co/4413485/42c5ed79a3fe2159ad165f9c2ad67002.png/show) Grace | Grace saves Emily from the crash while The Girl (Shadow Ghost) appears in the Water Treatment Plant. It still **weak to light** in this area. |
| 5 | [![Image 10: Emily (Transformed)](https://img.game8.co/4427684/f1140e9c3523977c5e2d844a94fd59d4.png/show)Emily](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583752) | ![Image 11: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Emily mutates into a monster and Leon steps in to kill her. |
| 6 | [![Image 12: Titan Spinner](https://img.game8.co/4427766/0c78f19c4c4f40b9b7b2d98a65a65683.png/show)Titan Spinner](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583646) | ![Image 13: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | On his way to the Raccoon City Center, Leon encounters a giant spider near a ruined building to escape. The spider finds its way inside and Leon must fight it while traversing the building. |
| 7 | [![Image 14: Victor and Garmr](https://img.game8.co/4427985/4c0317ff0b16b69c6bf2547cdda102cb.png/show)Victor and Garmrs](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583699) | ![Image 15: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Mutated dogs ambush Leon, as he's riding a motorcycle on the way to the Raccoon City Center. Victor soon gives chase on another motorcycle and fights Leon. |
| 8 | [![Image 16: Mr. X](https://img.game8.co/4428129/d5065fc90a67f96b89ba6fd85b08a9eb.png/show)Mr. X](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583720) | ![Image 17: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Akin to Mr. X from Resident Evil 2, Leon fights a similar enemy as he attempts to save Grace from her captor. |
| 9 | [![Image 18: Plant 43](https://img.game8.co/4428284/fef49f6864da76c18a8d32d625fb9c18.png/show)Plant 43](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583727) | ![Image 19: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Leon gets blocked by a Giant Mutated Plant in entrance to the ARK Facility. The only way forward is to exterminate this gigantic plant to get inside. |
| 10 | [![Image 20: The Commander](https://img.game8.co/4428370/10182b87c8d7593512c03370b455d628.png/show)The Commander](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583743) | ![Image 21: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Leon encounters a commander of Umbrella Corp.'s security operatives, that looks exactly like [HUNK](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583464). Leon must successfully **parry the enemy's melee attack to stagger** him temporarily so he can land some attacks. After the fight is over, Leon will be able to loot the [Mortal Edge](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583692) melee weapon. |
| 11 | [![Image 22: Victor](https://img.game8.co/4428592/7fe1fa0420db7e54b6d8dacac422a98d.png/show)Victor (Final Boss)](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583755) | ![Image 23: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Leon faces off against Victor, who serves as the final boss of the game. Victor has two phases; he mutates into a larger monster after taking enough damage. |

This is the list of bosses that the two protagonists, Leon and Grace, will encounter throughout the game.

| # | Boss | Playable Character | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | [![Image 24: Cheff Boss Icon](https://img.game8.co/4428346/f2dc967363a89396e5ba0c3bb0a33425.png/show)Chef](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583731) | ![Image 25: Grace Ashcroft](https://img.game8.co/4413485/42c5ed79a3fe2159ad165f9c2ad67002.png/show) Grace * * * ![Image 26: Leon Kennedy](https://img.game8.co/4413486/d30dbda6850ab396f8e27a876e8bff47.png/show) Leon | Grace first encounters the Chef while it is cooking in the Kitchen, located at the West Wing of the [Care Center](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583248). This boss can be killed by either Grace or Leon, and will grant access to the Pantry upon defeat. |
| 2 | [![Image 27: Chunk](https://img.game8.co/4427118/0ceb29b4527068bf7937e1371a3e5329.png/show)Should You Kill Chunk as Grace?](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583750) | ![Image 28: Grace Ashcroft](https://img.game8.co/4413485/42c5ed79a3fe2159ad165f9c2ad67002.png/show) Grace | While exploring the East Wing of the [Care Center](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583248), Grace will run into a Chunk separate from the one Leon needs to fight. While you can choose to avoid fighting this Chunk, killing it will reward you with the [Eye Spy Charm](https://game8.co/games/Resident-Evil-Requiem/archives/583705). |
![Image 29: RE9 Wiki](https://img.game8.co/4413533/a1c66cda4ff982b84455099276795492.png/show)
